name: Farsons Beer Festival
description: Malta's biggest beer festival — 10 days of craft beer, live music across 4 stages, food, and summer vibes at Ta' Qali. Featuring Cisk, Blue Label, Guinness, and guest brews.
transport: Multiple bus routes to Ta' Qali National Park
extras: Main stage acts typically kick off around 9:30 – 9:45pm. 4 stages: Main Stage, Rock Stage, Casa Electronica, Craft Beer Area.

name: Balzan Festa — The Annunciation of Mary
description: Balzan's annual village feast celebrating the Annunciation of Mary. A week of street decorations, band marches, and fireworks leading up to the Sunday procession.
transport: Bus routes through Balzan — check Tallinja app for schedules
extras: Friday: medium fireworks display. Saturday evening: main aerial show + ground fireworks around 11pm. Sunday: procession and final aerial display.

name: Lija Festa — Christ Our Saviour
description: One of Malta's most spectacular festas. Lija is legendary for its fireworks — the aerial displays are considered among the best on the island.
transport: Bus routes through Lija — check Tallinja app for schedules
extras: Famous for aerial firework displays — one of Malta's top firework festas. Ground fireworks typically around 11pm on the eve of the feast.
